name: Detect Poison
effect: Reveals all active poisons on target
verbal: I call upon nature to Detect Poison

name: Darkness
effect: Extinguish 1 in-game light
verbal: I grant you the power of Darkness.

name: Illumination
effect: Creates a light (must have phys rep)
verbal: I grant you the power of Illumination

name: Endow
effect: Allows recipient to deal two additional points of damage for next attack with a melee weapon
verbal: I grant you the power of an Endow

name: Mend
effect: Target's (unconscious or dying) body is 1
verbal: I call upon nature to Mend you

name: Detect Magic
effect: Reveals to the caster (and only the caster) if any magic exists on the target.
verbal: I call forth mystic power to Detect Magic

name: Leaf Armor
effect: 5 points of magical armour
verbal: May Nature Grant me Leaf Armor

name: Magic Armor
effect: Automatic spell defence against next physical attack
verbal: I grant you the power of a Magic Armor

name: Delayed Endow
effect: Two additional points of damage with melee weapon - One attack. May be expended to Rip and Pin and Bind effects
verbal: I grant you the power of a Delayed Endow

name: Pin
effect: This binding spell immediately forces the right foot of the victim to be fixed in place.
verbal: With mystic force I Pin you

name: Tyrran Beam
effect: 10 points of damage to extra-planar being
verbal: I harness the power of a Tyrran Beam 10

name: Weakness
effect: Victim deals 5 points less damage with a weapon
verbal: I curse you with Weakness

name: Remove Weakness
effect: Removes any active Weakness effects
verbal: I rid you of your Weakness

name: Shatter
effect: Causes targeted hand-held item to become useless and unusable. Up to the size of a shield.
verbal: I summon a force to Shatter <item>

name: Spittle/Poison Spittle
effect: 15 points of damage to target. Acid or Poison
verbal: I harness the power of <physical acid/damage poison> 15

name: Awaken
effect: Removes Silence, Sleep, Calm, Shun, Charm, Fear
verbal: I command you to Awaken

name: Nausea
effect: Victim becomes nauseated, no in-game actions
verbal: I call upon nature to Nauseate you

name: Remove Nausea
effect: This spell removes the effect Nausea.
verbal: I call upon nature to Remove Nausea

name: Bind
effect: Bind victims arms
verbal: With mystic force, I Bind you

name: Poison Shield
effect: Protects recipient from next poison attack
verbal: I grant you the power of a Poison Shield

name: Treeskin
effect: 10 points of magical armour, caster only
verbal: May nature grant me Treeskin

name: Tyrran Bolt
effect: 20 points of damage to exra-planar being
verbal: I harness the power of a Tyrran Bolt 20

name: Greater Spittle
effect: 25 points of damage to target. Acid or Poison
verbal: I harness the power of <physical acid/damage poison> 25

name: Animal Ways
effect: Caster is perceived as target animal and can communicate
verbal: May nature grant me Animal Ways as <animal type or plant>

name: Silence
effect: Victim cannot speak or cast spells
verbal: I command you to Silence

name: Tyrran Aura
effect: Recipient may use carrier Tyrran against 1 opponent
verbal: I Grant you the Power of a Tyrran Aura

name: Release
effect: Frees the target binding effects or held by non-magical means
verbal: With mystic force I Release you

name: Shield Magic
effect: Bestows an automatic Spell Defense triggered by a Spellstrike, or magical effect.
verbal: I call forth mystic power to Shield Magic

name: Elemental Shield
effect: Automatic spell defence against next elemental attack
verbal: I grant you the power of an Elemental Shield

name: Sleep
effect: Causes victim to fall into a deep sleep for the duration
verbal: I command you to Sleep

name: Destroy
effect: Causes the targeted item to become useless and unusable. The target may be up to the size of a normal door.
verbal: I summon a force to Destroy <item>

name: Tyrran Storm
effect: 30 points of damage to exra-planar being
verbal: I harness the power of a Tyrran Storm 30

name: Deadly Spittle
effect: 35 points of damage to target. Acid or Poison
verbal: I harness the power of <physical acid/damage poison> 35

name: Pestilence
effect: Induces Drain effect on target. No in-game skills or running
verbal: I harness the power of Pestilence

name: Dispel Magic
effect: Removes all magical effects on the target
verbal: I call forth mystic power to Dispel Magic

name: Paralyze
effect: Completely immobilises victim
verbal: I curse you with Paralysis

name: Unparalyze
effect: Removes a Paralyze effect
verbal: I rid you of Paralysis

name: Reflect Magic
effect: Automatic spell defence against next magical attack
verbal: I call forth mystic power to Reflect Magic

name: Tyrran Blast
effect: 45 points of damage to exra-planar being
verbal: I harness the power of a Tyrran Blast 40
